'''Shadow V Combat Airspeeders''' were [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] produced by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]]. The [[Shadow IV Civilian Airspeeder]] was a civilian version of it.

{{Veh-stub}}
